name: Ferry Building

items.item_name: Ferry Building Seawall and Substructure Earthquake Reliability Project

summary_en: Archive documents cover the Ferry Building as a Port of San Francisco property, including a 1983 final environmental impact report on the Ferry Building complex (the Embarcadero, World Trade Center, Agriculture Building and Pier One), a 1971 northern-waterfront comprehensive plan, and Port Commission minutes on repairs to correct damage sustained by the building, on plaza planting, and on grant funds for the Ferry Building renovation and restoration project. The building is operated by the Port of San Francisco, whose FY2025 budget line is $156M; no place-specific city contract appears in this data.
